reward: Earn 2 months of free Audible by logging 18km on Strava before the time runs out, or it's game over!

name: On Squad Race Berlin Challenge
description: Show what real energy looks like. Run the segment to earn a digital badge.
reward: Complete the segment to earn the official On Squad Race Berlin digital badge.

name: Liquid I.V. Tear, Pour, Move More
description: Say YES to summer and hydration worth celebrating with Liquid I.V.
time: Jun 1, 2026 to Jun 30, 2026  —  1 day until start
reward: Your wins matter. Hydration should too. Say YES - earn free Liquid I.V. + a chance to win a year's supply.

name: Ed Sheeran's Million Mile Loop Challenge
description: Run your Loop. Win tickets to see Ed Sheeran live.
reward: Every mile counts! Log one to help hit 1M and win tickets to Ed Sheeran's Loop Tour.

reward: By running the route and taking the detour to the bar, runners earn a Heineken 0.0 to toast the finish line.
